draftNote: 4 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Mr_Meat31 (midlaneâ†’offlane), Cuban Noobster (jungleâ†’carry), Willy Guggenheim (offlaneâ†’jungle), Xeebs (supportâ†’jungle).

coaching.headline: Our one ahead lane (The Fey mid) kept skipping the early fights â€” the other four kept fighting without him and lost the map. Objectives 12-28.
coaching.team: Three lanes were behind all game, but the fights show the real bleed: The Fey mid was even-or-ahead and ALIVE, yet flagged 'never joined' at the 9m, 11m, 12m and 16m fights â€” so the team kept opening 5-mans without their best player and losing them. The 9m river fight is a textbook bad trade: even bodies (5v5), no objective up, and we flipped a coin-toss with two players absent. Then once lanes cracked, the 20m and 22m fights had two pinned, losing lanes who couldn't help â€” those were the wrong fights to start. The 30m loss bought us Orb Prime, so read that one as a trade, not a throw. Two fixes: when one lane is ahead, that player shoves and rotates so we fight 5v5 with our strongest body â€” and don't take open-map coin-toss fights with no major up. Itemize armor too: only 1/5 built it into a physical-heavy enemy (their Murdock did 34k).
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Three lanes were behind all game, and four players kept fighting while the one ahead lane sat mid â€” fight after fight we were a body short of even. Get the winning lane to rotate before committing, and don't flip a no-objective 5v5; reset and take vision/farm instead.

perPlayer.7c8ab99c-31c5-4ea5-a6fa-e0d6417c3f1b: The Fey mid, 4/5/8 and team-high 36.6k â€” Mr_Meat31's lane was the only one ahead, which makes the early fights the story: Mr_Meat31 was alive and not there for the 9m, 11m, 12m and 16m fights the team lost. When ahead and pushed in, shove the wave and rotate to the fight so the team isn't a body down. The Wraith Leggings spike (~19m) is exactly when those roams hit hardest.
perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Zinx into Rampage offlane was theirs at every checkpoint â€” 5/10/3, ten deaths into a losing matchup with no item spike to swing it. By 20m and 22m Willy Guggenheim was the pinned, losing body who couldn't rotate, so the team taking fights without Zinx was on the wrong side of the numbers. Stop trading into Rampage before the items are online; farm safe and let the team group on Zinx's terms, not Rampage's.
perPlayer.a0c393cc-1437-4bdc-8168-64676ce2166c: Khaimera jungle, 3/10/2 â€” the Zarus matchup was even only at the first check, then theirs from 10 minutes, and Cuban Noobster never finished the core (no Basilisk/Rapture) or bought armor into a 3-physical comp. Cuban was in most of the losing skirmishes; the fix is to stop forcing fights into a lead that isn't there â€” full-clear to the items first and reset instead of contesting a fight a body short.
perPlayer.16f28434-561f-4f23-9454-40321f4a1ef3: Drongo carry, 2/8/4 into an even Murdock lane â€” even at every checkpoint means it was winnable, but eight deaths and an unfinished core (no Vanquisher/Imperator) sank it, and Goldilocks324 was flagged absent from the early fights too. Play the even lane safe, complete the core, then group â€” when the lane is even, the player who joins the fight first is the one who tips the numbers.
perPlayer.a412baf3-dd17-4f89-8ecf-9d0704f3a79e: Argus support, 2/6/8 into an unfavored Aurora (theirs through 25 minutes) â€” behind the matchup with no spike to swing it, and Xeebs was the pinned, losing body in the 11m fight the team took without Xeebs. When the lane is losing, don't get caught out as the body down; play safe and ward so the team doesn't fight 5 with Xeebs stranded.

synergy: Little hard CC on our side â€” we can't force a pick. Play for poke/objectives and punish their cooldowns, don't flip coin-toss 5v5s.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit â€” group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Bramble Patch slow â†’ Harvest Nettles stacks â†’ Untamed Growth DoT â†’ Fly Trap pull ult
ourKits.winCondition: Fly Trap a clumped team and detonate AoE on the pull
ourKits.passive: takedowns spawn growths + grant move speed
ourKits.playWith: engage that clumps for her Fly Trap
ourKits.playAgainst: spread out vs the pull; she's squishy â€” dive her

ourKits.combo: Old Rusty slow â†’ Gag Grenade silence â†’ Rad Rounds basics â†’ Shrapnel Cannon armor shred
ourKits.winCondition: kite back, stack Wastelander bleed and Rad Rounds, melt from range
ourKits.playWith: peel and frontline so he can free-fire
ourKits.playAgainst: low mobility â€” dive him or break LoS through his poke; he folds to hard engage

ourKits.combo: Ambush leap â†’ Unleash AS â†’ Cull stun, Invigorate to cleanse+heal
ourKits.winCondition: stick on one target, stun with Cull and out-sustain via Spirit Regen
ourKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his Cull stun
ourKits.playAgainst: ANTI-HEAL is mandatory â€” it guts his whole kit; kite the leap and CC through Invigorate

ourKits.combo: Ricochet stun â†’ Bad Medicine zone â†’ Infuse heal an ally â†’ Neural Regenesis revive
ourKits.winCondition: keep an ally alive with Infuse + the revive ult and poke with Ricochet
ourKits.playWith: a carry she can pocket-heal and revive
ourKits.playAgainst: she can't heal herself â€” dive HER; bait the revive before committing

ourKits.combo: Dread Nova stun â†’ Ether Crystal push/lift â†’ Particle Shredder channel â†’ Synaptic Obliterator beams
ourKits.winCondition: poke from max range and zone with the crystal
ourKits.playWith: a frontline to protect his stationary channel
ourKits.playAgainst: dodge Dread Nova; dive him during the immobile ult channel

enemyKits.combo: Boreal Sweep slow â†’ Hoarfrost root â†’ Glacial Charge engage â†’ Cryoseism stun ult
enemyKits.winCondition: chain frost CC (slowâ†’rootâ†’stun) to lock the fight down
enemyKits.playWith: burst that converts her long CC chain into kills
enemyKits.playAgainst: she's a CC battery â€” cleanse/QSS the Cryoseism stun; spread to avoid the chain

enemyKits.combo: Static Trap root â†’ Buckshot â†’ Hot Pursuit AS â†’ Long Arm of the Law global snipe
enemyKits.winCondition: trap for the root, then out-range with Shots Fired and finish with the global ult
enemyKits.passive: every 5th basic is a long-range bonus shot
enemyKits.playWith: frontline/peel to protect his low mobility
enemyKits.playAgainst: almost no escape â€” engage past the trap and he dies

enemyKits.combo: Mark a target â†’ Hive slow â†’ Swarm reposition â†’ Curse execute-burst ult
enemyKits.winCondition: Mark + Curse a squishy and delete them with %max-HP Pestilence
enemyKits.playWith: setup that holds her marked target
enemyKits.playAgainst: she's squishy with one escape (Swarm) â€” dive after it's used; spread vs Hive

enemyKits.combo: Pounce â†’ Rumble slow â†’ Boulder Throw â†’ Behemoth ult to brawl
enemyKits.winCondition: engage with Pounce, grow with Behemoth and out-sustain the fight
enemyKits.passive: ramping health regen for jungle sustain
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up damage while he front-lines and CCs
enemyKits.playAgainst: anti-heal and kiting beat his sustain brawl; burst him before Behemoth

enemyKits.combo: Evade in â†’ Barricade block â†’ Spear of Nyr (execute <20%) â†’ Coliseum ult arena
enemyKits.winCondition: trap a target in Coliseum and out-duel with stacked Gladiator
enemyKits.playWith: a team that joins him inside the Coliseum
enemyKits.playAgainst: don't fight him in his arena â€” disengage; burst through Barricade's window
